features: TROPICAL BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, it will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with cocount & lime essential oils in a resealable bag for easy storage.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxing of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with cocount & lime essential oils in a resealable bag for easy storage. Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins . Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it. Ready to use, fragranced with coconut and lime and resealable bag 450g Ingredients Epsomsalt Directions Add the Epsom Bath Salts to your bathwater and soak to enjoy the benefits. Safety Warning Do not ingest. For external use only. See more
